label: plain_text
text:
1. How many total cars passed through the crossing between 6 a.m.
and noon?
Why do you think so little traffic occurred during the hour of
6-7 a.m., as compared to the other hours from 7 a.m.-noon?
3。
Why do you think the traffic was the heaviest between 7-8 a.m.?
4。
Why do you think the traffic was lesser and lesser each hour after
8 a.m. all the way until noon?
